description: Look up detailed information about a specific EDOT or OTel component. Use when the user asks about a specific receiver, processor, exporter, SDK, or collector component.

configuration.query: FROM edot-assistant-docs-elastic,edot-assistant-github-repos | WHERE body_semantic MATCH ?component_name | KEEP title, body, url, content_type, language_sdk, tags | SORT _score DESC | LIMIT 5

component_name.description: The name of the EDOT or OTel component to look up (e.g., 'hostmetrics receiver', 'EDOT Java SDK', 'batch processor')
